zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Colvill於1430年出生在英國賀特福爾阿爾布瑞時，她的父親Sir Robert Colville 10th Lord Oxnam30歲，母親Lady Christian Crichton-3歲。她於大約1450年與Henry Barley Sheriff of Essex在英國英格蘭賀特福爾阿爾布瑞結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1524年在英國賀特福爾享年94歲。

nameMeanings.name: Colvill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Colville
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Colleville in Seine-Maritime, France, named with the Scandinavian personal name Koli (see Cole 2) + Old French ville ‘settlement, village’. The Scottish branch of the family were descended from Philip de Colville, who came to Scotland as a household knight of kings Malcolm IV (1153–65) and William ‘the Lion’ (1165–1214).

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Colvill was born in 1430, in Albury, Hertfordshire, England, her father, Sir Robert Colville 10th Lord Oxnam, was 30 and her mother, Lady Christian Crichton, was -3. She married Henry Barley Sheriff of Essex about 1450, in Albury, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1524, in Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 94.

Elle a épousé Henry Barley Sheriff of Essex environ 1450, à Albury, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1524, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 94 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Colvillが1430年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアルブリーで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Colville 10th Lord Oxnamは30歳，母Lady Christian Crichtonは-3歳であった。約1450年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアルブリーでHenry Barley Sheriff of Essexと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1524年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで94歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Colvill(이)가 1430년 영국 허트퍼드실르 알버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Colville 10th Lord Oxnam(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Christian Crichton(은)는 -3세였다. 그녀는 대략 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 알버이에서 Henry Barley Sheriff of Essex(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1524년 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 94세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Colvill родилась в 1430 г. в местности албури, хиртфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Colville 10th Lord Oxnam было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Christian Crichton, -3. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Barley Sheriff of Essex около 1450 г. в местности албури, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1524 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 94 лет.
